examples: The rain water drains into this big vat
The exercise class drains me of energy

meanings.definition: empty of liquid; drain the liquid from

examples: Life in the camp drained him

meanings.definition: emptied or exhausted of (as by drawing off e.g. water or other liquid)
examples: a drained and apathetic old man...not caring any longer about anything
left the lights on and came back to find the battery drained
